mapper.insert: INSERT INTO penalty_records (user_id, penalty_type, reason, operator_id, penalty_time, expire_time, status, remark, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{penaltyType}, #{reason}, #{operatorId}, NOW(), #{expireTime} NULL, 1, #{remark}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE penalty_records SET status = 0, remark = CONCAT(IFNULL(remark, ''), ' | 解除备注: ', #{remark}) WHERE id = #{id}
